No Poverty.reason: No evidence in the course syllabus supports contributions to eradicating poverty.

Good Health and Well-being.reason: The course explicitly aims to '提升身體運動能力' (improve physical athletic ability) and promote badminton as a '終身運動' (lifelong sport), directly supporting Target 3.4 on promoting mental health and well-being through prevention.

Quality Education.reason: The course focuses on '增進羽球基本技能' (enhance basic badminton skills) and '建立正確運動觀念' (establish correct sports concepts), and promotes a '終身運動' (lifelong sport), aligning with skill development (4.4) and education for sustainable lifestyles (4.7).

Gender Equality.reason: The course is explicitly designated for 'male' students ('體育[男]'), indicating it does not promote gender equality.
